title: phenax hirtus var. pentlandianus
intro: Phenax hirtus var. pentlandianus, also known as Pentland's Phenax, is a variety of the Phenax hirtus plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Pentland's Phenax include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of using Pentland's Phenax include its ability to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and soothe skin irritations. Pentland's Phenax can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment, with the latter being particularly useful for treating skin conditions and wounds.
